usage.primary_runtime_target: Sundered Keep causeway entrance / gatehouse approach
recommended_integration: Register textures in the Sundered Keep asset table or JSON level asset registry.
Use floors/water as tileable base assets.
Use edges/walls/props as placed sprites or layered tilemap assets.
Use causeway_reconstruct_plan.json as a starter layout recipe.
